rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO APARTMENT ASSOCIATION VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleading
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2019 line 1. Defendant'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleading is continued to January 10, 2020. By no later than December 18, 2019 parties to file supplemental briefs addressing the effect of Assembly Bill 1482, if any, on the instant Petition. By no later than January 2, 2019 parties may file responses to supplemental briefs. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES C. FREEMAN ET AL VS. HEADLANDS MORTGAGE COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Judgment Of Quiet Title; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Geoffrey Murry In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF JAMES FREEMAN, JAMES ARCHIBALD Motion For Judgment Of Quiet Title is OFF CALENDAR for Department 501. Motion for entry of judgment upon entry of default shall be calendared in Department 514. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JASON DRUMMOND VS. ROBERT L. STEVENSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF JASON DRUMMOND MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER is DENIED. Plaintiff failed to shift its burden. While Plaintiff references applicable CFR stating that a copy of the operative Notice shall be served on HA, Plaintiff provides no competent evidence of such service. Further, there is a triable issue of fact re: discrimination defense. Request for summary adjudication of retaliation defense is denied. No such defense alleged in the answer. To the extent Plaintiff meant defense of discrimination, Plaintiff provides no explanation for its conclusion that Defendant lacks any evidence of discrimination. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 672 CASTRO STREET, LLC VS. JEANINE REISBIG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT JEANINE REISBIG, GALE GOLDEN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file. =(501/CFH)
